intro_section.description: I build modern, functional, and user-oriented interfaces.

about_me_section.description: Frontend Developer with expert knowledge in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, specializing in responsive landing pages and high-conversion HTML emails. I create modern, interactive user interfaces using React and TypeScript with a focus on UI/UX and pixel-perfect design. With hands-on experience in HubSpot, Mailchimp, and WordPress, I bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution. My background in Java and SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) provides a deep understanding of the full development lifecycle. I deliver clean code, meet tight deadlines, and am fluent in English.

stack_section.title: My Tech Stack
stack_section.description: Tools and technologies I use to bring cool projects to life.

experience_section.title: Experience & Education
experience_section.subtitle: My professional journey in development and the academic foundation that helps me build quality products.
experience_section.web_description: Specialized in creating responsive email campaigns and landing pages from scratch based on provided designs. Ensured pixel-perfect layouts and consistent rendering across all major email clients.
experience_section.unv_description: Focusing on IT project management, software architecture, and advanced web development principles.

landing_wp.description: Developed and deployed a WordPress landing page. Fully configured the admin panel to allow the client to manage content and images. Integrated feedback form plugins.

landing_hb.description: Created a HubSpot page. Set up content editing via standard modules and integrated HubSpot forms for CRM lead generation.

landing_shopify.description: Worked on Shopify store page layouts. Customized theme sections to enable the owner to edit content through the native Shopify editor.

landing_gh.description: Developed and configured a HubSpot landing page. Exposed core blocks to the admin panel for easy editing and integrated platform forms.

email_hb.description: Coded a HubSpot email template. Achieved Pixel Perfect precision. Tested rendering on Android, iOS, Gmail, Outlook, and Samsung Mail.

email_klaviyo.description: Developed a Klaviyo template. Verified responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop. Tested in iOS, Android, and Gmail email clients.

email_customer.description: Created a responsive email for Customer.io. Tested across multiple devices and major email service providers.

email_mailchimp.description: Mailchimp email template. Executed Pixel Perfect coding. Ensured stability in Outlook, Gmail, and Apple Mail.

email_active.description: Developed and verified an Active Campaign email. Tested display on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices (Samsung, iPhone).

footer.quote_text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
